market_session: European regular close; Yahoo Finance historical daily row, currency EUR

market_session: Bank of England June MPC decision; meeting ended 2026-06-17
text: The Bank of England's Monetary Policy Committee voted 7-2 to keep Bank Rate at 3.75% at the meeting ending June 17, 2026; two members preferred a 25 bp increase to 4.00%.

value.offset: US-Iran interim peace plan limited downside
central_bank_context: Bank of England held Bank Rate at 3.75%
Swiss National Bank left policy rate unchanged

market_session: DPA/Yahoo European close wrap after the June 18 regular session
text: DPA's European close wrap said regional stocks closed broadly lower as interest-rate concerns after the Federal Reserve's hawkish tone weighed on sentiment, while news of a US-Iran interim peace plan helped limit the downside; investors also digested unchanged BoE and SNB policy decisions.

market_session: DPA/Yahoo European close wrap after the June 18 regular session
text: DPA's close wrap identified heavy dispersion: in the UK LSEG fell 7%, Persimmon 6.1%, Fresnillo 5.8%, and Endeavour Mining 5.7%; in Germany Infineon climbed about 6.5% and Siemens Energy 4.7% while Mercedes-Benz, SAP and BMW fell 4.0%-4.6%; in France Capgemini fell nearly 9%, while Edenred rose more than 17%, Legrand 5%, and STMicroelectronics and Kering about 4.5% each.
